tasks.subject: Task 0: Backend — Connections List Endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a GET endpoint that returns all integration connections for the authenticated user.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/backend/integrations/connections_router.py`
- Modify: `src/backend/main.py:36-54`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /integrations/connections returns connections list
- Uses JWT auth
- No encrypted tokens in response

**Verify:** `curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:8000/integrations/connections`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/integrations/connections_router.py", "src/backend/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "curl http://localhost:8000/integrations/connections", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /integrations/connections returns connections list", "Uses JWT auth", "No encrypted tokens in response"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Frontend — Unstub useIntegrations Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace stubbed useIntegrations hook with real API calls.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/hooks/useIntegrations.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- connectionsQuery fetches from GET /integrations/connections
- connectMutation redirects to OAuth URL
- disconnectMutation calls DELETE and invalidates cache

**Verify:** Click Connect → browser redirects to OAuth

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useIntegrations.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["connectionsQuery fetches real connections", "connectMutation redirects to OAuth URL", "disconnectMutation calls DELETE and invalidates cache"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Google Drive — File Browser Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a React Query hook for Google Drive browse/import/export.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useGoogleDrive.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- useDriveBrowse returns files in a folder
- useDriveImport mutation works
- useDriveExport mutation works

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useGoogleDrive.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useDriveBrowse returns files", "useDriveImport mutation works", "useDriveExport mutation works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Google Drive — File Browser Panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build Drive file browser component with folder navigation and import.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/workspace/integrations/DrivePanel.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- File list renders from Drive root
- Folder navigation with breadcrumbs
- Import with project picker
- Loading skeleton

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/workspace/integrations/DrivePanel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["File list renders", "Folder navigation works", "Import works", "Loading skeleton shows"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Slack — Settings Hook & Notification Panel
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create Slack channels/settings hook and notification configuration panel.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useSlackSettings.ts`
- Create: `src/components/workspace/integrations/SlackPanel.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- useSlackChannels returns channels
- useSlackSettings fetches and updates settings
- SlackPanel shows event types with channel pickers
- Toggle updates backend

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useSlackSettings.ts", "src/components/workspace/integrations/SlackPanel.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useSlackChannels returns channels", "useSlackSettings works", "SlackPanel renders", "Toggle updates backend"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: IntegrationHub — Show Provider Panels When Connected
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update IntegrationHub to show DrivePanel/SlackPanel when connected, add Configure button.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/workspace/IntegrationHub.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/workspace/IntegrationCard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Configure button on connected cards
- DrivePanel opens for Google Drive
- SlackPanel opens for Slack
- Only one panel at a time
- Panel closeable

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/workspace/IntegrationHub.tsx", "src/components/workspace/IntegrationCard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Configure button shows", "Panels open correctly", "One panel at a time", "Closeable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Backend — Wire Slack Event Handlers at Startup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register Slack notify_for_event as handler for all events in the event bus.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/backend/main.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Slack handler registered for all events at startup
- Task creation triggers Slack notification
- Handler failures isolated

**Verify:** Create task → check Slack channel → notification appears

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/backend/main.py"], "verifyCommand": "curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/boards/tasks", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Slack handler registered at startup", "Notifications fire on events", "Failures isolated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Integration Testing & Polish
tasks.description:
**Goal:** End-to-end test and polish both integrations.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Google Drive full flow works
- Slack full flow works
- OAuth redirect works
- Loading states correct
- Error states handled

**Verify:** Complete manual test checklist

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Google Drive flow works", "Slack flow works", "OAuth redirect works", "Loading states correct"]}
```
